data.title: Elon Musk Hosts X Spaces With Afd's Alice Weidel After Successfully Endorsing Trump: Share Views On Nuclear Power And Future Of Europe With Far Right German Leader
data.description: Elon Musk sparked controversy by hosting a live discussion on X with Alice Weidel, co-leader of Germany's far-right AfD party, endorsing the party while sharing controversial views on immigration, Ukraine, and Germany's future, raising concerns about his political influence in Europe.

data.title: Tesla Bull Gary Black Warns Against Inflated Optimus Robot Assumptions: Get Pounded Each Time 'I Try To Right-Size Expectations'
data.description: Tesla Inc. investor Gary Black cautioned against setting unrealistic expectations for the company's Optimus robot program on Thursday, sparking debate about the electric vehicle maker's valuation metrics and growth prospects.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Slip Ahead Of Key Jobs Data Release: Top Analyst Remains Positive On 2025 — 'It's Bull Market Year'
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies mounted losses on Thursday as investors remained cautious ahead of the release of a crucial jobs report

data.title: Google And Boeing Contribute $1M Each To Trump's Inauguration Fund: YouTube To Livestream Event
data.description: Google and Boeing pledge $1M each to Trump's 2025 inauguration fund. YouTube to livestream the inauguration.

data.title: Jack Ma Once Said Amazon Is More Like An Empire While Alibaba Empowers Others: How These Two Retail Giants Charted Very Different Paths
data.description: Jack Ma highlighted the core difference between Amazon and Alibaba, describing Amazon as an empire that controls its entire supply chain, while Alibaba focuses on empowering others by enabling small businesses and partners to thrive through its platform.
